generated.tagline: Coffee Culture Alkapuri — cafe in Vadodara
generated.blurb1: Coffee Culture Alkapuri is a neighbourhood cafe in Vadodara. The room is unfussy and the regulars know the staff by name. This is a draft preview — real copy is generated by Claude Haiku 4.5 once an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is wired up.
generated.blurb2: Hours and address are pulled from the business's own listing, so what you see here is what you would find walking up to the door. If the rest of this page looks close to right, the next step is a short conversation about turning it into a live site.
